series_metadata.series_title: BSI-SB Attorney Work Papers, Legal Research and Legal Memorandum
series_metadata.series_description: These files include legal research, memorandums and attorney work papers for legal projects completed by attorneys employed by the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files until no longer of legal significance., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
